creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry Chris I won't be able to fulfill this PR and will be returning to the pool. The patch has multiple issues that must be resolved.

jason@xts-bsd:/usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla % portlint -ac
WARN: Makefile: how about using "${MASTER_SITE_GNOME}" with "MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon", instead of "https://download.gnome.org/teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon/"?
WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
FATAL: /usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla/distinfo: has no SIZE record for ICON-Gorilla.tar.gz.
FATAL: /usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla/distinfo: no checksum record for ICON-Gorilla.tar.gz.
WARN: /usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla/distinfo: no checksum records for all supported algorithms (SHA256) for ICON-Gorilla.tar.gz.
2 fatal errors and 3 warnings found.
jason@xts-bsd:/usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla % make fetch
/!\ gnome-icons-gorilla-20060726: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Please set LICENSE for this port

===>   gnome-icons-gorilla-20060726 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> ICON-Gorilla.tar.gz is not in /usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla/distinfo is out of date, or
=> ICON-Gorilla.tar.gz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla
